changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between item_data and module_item_data
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_item_data_to_module ON item_data; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_item_data_to_module_item_data();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between item_group and module_item_group
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_item_group_to_module ON item_group; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_item_group_to_module_item_group();

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create guarded bidirectional sync between response_set and module_response_set
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_response_set_to_module ON response_set; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_response_set_to_module_response_set();
